parsed_answer.fix_summary: Handles the cleared-vs-missing distinction by raising a ValidationError on FILE_INPUT_CONTRADICTION (both a file and clear-checkbox submitted), returning False when the field is cleared (not required), falling back to the initial value when no new data is provided, and otherwise delegating to super().clean() / to_python() for normal validation.
